original_image_tags: Single page of aged, off-white paper, likely the reverse side of a document. The page is blank except for physical characteristics. Two dark, round hole-punch marks are visible at the top center and top right. Minor speckling and a faint, yellowish stain are present in the lower right quadrant. The right edge shows minor wear and a small tear. The page appears to be part of a bound or stapled document.

elements.description: Blank page with two hole-punch marks at the top edge and faint scattered specks.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page is essentially blank with two hole-punch marks and minor specks, indicating no real visual content beyond the page's physical state.
